title: Warm compliance and care editorial field
prompt: Create a 16:9 warm editorial enterprise visual for TSI compliance-and-care storytelling. Light warm paper foundation, subtle stone neutrals, TSI dark blue #001E41 typography zones and TSI bright blue #4396F6 linework. Abstract regulated workflow field with gentle arcs, document silhouettes, customer-care touchpoints, and validation marks. Premium, subtle, calm, sophisticated, print-informed. Leave clean logo-safe space upper left and text-safe space on the left third. No logos, no readable text, no fake records, no client/account/patient/borrower data, no distressed people, no legal-threat imagery, no watermarks.
notes: Shows how warm editorial neutrals can support TSI blue anchors.
package_asset_policy: full-resolution PNG omitted from compact package; use bundled WebP preview for visual reference and regenerate from prompt metadata for production use.
